headlines.headline: Stephen A. fired up over Jaylen Brown's ejection: 'It's egregious!'
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith sounds off on Jaylen Brown's ejection for arguing a non-call during the Celtics' loss to the Spurs.

headlines.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
headlines.description: From breaking news to the latest intel from around the NBA, here are the biggest highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast.

headlines.headline: Stephen A. defends Bam's 83-point night: Not his fault Wizards are 'trash'
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith reacts to Bam Adebayo's 83-point performance against the Wizards.

headlines.headline: Ogwumike: Bam's 83-point night an 'inspirational, global pause button'
headlines.description: Chiney Ogwumike and Alan Hahn react to Bam Adebayo's 83-point game against the Wizards.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA mock draft: Who's rising and falling ahead of March Madness?

headlines.headline: NBA Power Rankings: Checking in on all 30 teams with a month left

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency grades: Trey Hendrickson, Riq Woolen

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL free agency live updates: Signings, trades, rumors
headlines.description: Players can officially sign at 4 p.m. ET Wednesday. We're following all NFL free agency moves as they happen.

headlines.headline: Agents: Colts to re-sign QB Daniel Jones to 2-year, $88M deal
headlines.description: The Colts and quarterback Daniel Jones reached agreement Wednesday on a two-year, $88 million contract that can be worth up to $100 million, his agents told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

headlines.headline: NFL free agency: Trey Hendrickson to Ravens; no Maxx Crosby trade
headlines.description: Over five days, Maxx Crosby was traded to the Ravens, the trade was called off and Baltimore signed Trey Hendrickson. Let's sort out this chaotic turn of events.

headlines.headline: Source: Chargers to re-sign versatile OL Trey Pipkins
headlines.description: The Chargers are bringing back veteran offensive lineman Trey Pipkins III on a two-year, $10 million deal, a source told ESPN on Tuesday.

headlines.headline: Stephen A. gives props to Ravens for signing Trey Hendrickson
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith weighs in on the Ravens signing Trey Hendrickson after backing out of trading for Maxx Crosby.

headlines.headline: Judging overreactions to the 2026 NHL trade deadline
headlines.description: The final week resulted in a last flurry of trades -- and many hot takes. We identify which takeaways are legit and which are way off base.

headlines.headline: NHL playoff standings: Projecting the Eastern wild cards
headlines.description: Montreal, Ottawa, Washington and Philly are in action Wednesday. Here are full playoff projections, draft lottery standings and more.
